title: Pack of 50 | Strong Disposable Bowls 8oz/240ml, Ecofriendly [4.5 x 1.77 inches ] Strong Paper Bowls for Hot & Cold Foods, Soup, Desserts, Salads, Microwave Safe
features: ✅Aaksh 555 | Pack of 50 | Strong Disposable Bowls 8oz/240ml, Ecofriendly [4.5 x 1.77 inches ]Strong Paper Bowls for Hot & Cold Foods, Soup, Desserts, Salads, Microwave Safe

✅STRONG & LEAK-RESISTANT BOWLS – MADE FOR HOT & COLD FOODS These premium 8oz/240ml Aaksh 555 paper bowls are designed to handle soups, curries, noodles, snacks, ice-cream, cereals, salads and more — without bending, leaking, or becoming soggy.
✅100% ECO-FRIENDLY Made from natural sugarcane bagasse, and plant-based material.

✅PERFECT SIZE – (4.5 x 1.77 INCHES) Compact, strong and easy to hold, these disposable bowls are ideal for portion control, kids meals, outdoor events, parties, picnics, BBQs, lunches, catering and takeaway use.

✅MICROWAVE, FREEZER & REHEAT SAFE Heat food safely in the microwave or store in the freezer without any risk of melting or warping. Built for real everyday use in UK homes, restaurants and food stalls.

✅VALUE PACK OF 50 – GREAT FOR EVENTS & BUSINESSES Bulk pack includes 50 strong disposable bowls, perfect for parties, office lunches, festivals, street food vendors, takeaways, home gatherings and eco-friendly catering solutions.
description: Pack of 50 STRONG DISPOSABLE BOWLS 8oz/240ml, USED FOR HOT & COLD FOODS, SOUP BOWLS, DESSERTS BOWLS, SERVING BOWLS, Biodegradable Ecofriendly Large Strong Bowls for Birthday Party Serving SOUP DESSERTS CAKE SNACKS SALADS \*/ PACK OF 50, STRONG DISPOSABLE BOWLS 8oz/240ml: Made from high density Bagasse sugar cane pulp Bowls are super rigid do not not fall apart Crumble or Dissolve when USED with Liquids & Hot foods ==> PACK OF 50 BOWLS, SIZE: 8oz / 230ml ==> Ideal for SOUP, SALAD, DESSERTS, CAKE, SNACKS, Birthday Party, Christmas Party, Business Events, Home, Office, School, Picnic BBQ Party, Large Gatherings, Household Parties ==> Perfect for Serving Soup, Ice cream, Salads and much more ==> They are Sturdy and Leak Proof ==> Bowls can be Microwaved and also can be Used for both Hot & Cold foods \*/ STURDY & STRONG: These Bowls have a Sturdy construction and they can withstand the weight of various Foods without Bending or Leaking ==> Whether you're serving Meals or delicate Appetisers, these Bowls provide reliable support ensuring a hassle free Dining experience ==> Liquid resistant & Super Strong ==> Perfect NATURAL Alternative to Plastic Bowls. \*/ IDEAL FOR EVERY EVENT: With a Sleek white design and optimal size, these Bowls add sophistication to your meal presentations. ==> These Bowls can be used on different Occasions like Parties, Picnics and gatherings and you can serve a variety of meals ==> NO MORE DISH WASHING OR CLEANING <== (()) MICROWAVE & FREEZER SAFE:- Bowls can be Microwaved or Placed in the Freezer, also can be USED for both Hot and Cold foods, allowing you to Easily reheat your Food or store it for later use without worrying about it losing its flavour or structure <^>ECOFRIENDLY and BIODEGRADABLE - These Compostable Bowls help reduce Environmental impact while providing a convenient Dining solution => Our Disposable Bowls are completely Compostable and will not harm the environment completely Non-toxic and Safe <^>PREMIUM QUALITY - Our Bowls are packaged only after passing rigorous Quality testing procedures and are truly the best on the market today => With a Sleek white design and optimal size, these Bowls add sophistication to your meal presentations
